ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or province where the city is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code used in the cities table */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the weather record pertains to */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Percentage of humidity */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloudiness */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "current_description" TEXT /* Current weather description */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_weather" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the historical weather record pertains to */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date on which the weather was recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Percentage of humidity */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloudiness */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Weather description */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_weather_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_conditions" (
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather record */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., weather alert, update) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
